ucs.title: [LLM] Rocke (Iron Cybercrime) cloud-agent uninstall preceding cryptojacker drop on Linux
ucs.description: Hunts Rocke's signature anti-defense move: silently uninstalling Alibaba Cloud (Aegis/aliyun-service) and Tencent Cloud (YunJing/qcloud-monitor/BCM) workload-protection agents on Linux servers before staging an XMRig/Monero miner. Talos and Palo Alto Unit 42 documented this exact agent-removal chain as unique to Rocke after Apache Struts / Oracle WebLogic / Adobe ColdFusion exploitation (T1190).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_process values(Processes.process_name) as process_name from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*aegis_uninstall*","*quartz_uninstall*","*aegis_update*","*qcloud-monitor*","*YunJing*","*aliyun-service*","*bcm-agent*") OR (Processes.process="*pkill*" AND Processes.process IN ("*aliyun*","*YunJing*","*aegis*","*qcloud*")) OR (Processes.process="*systemctl*" AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND Processes.process IN ("*aegis*","*aliyun*","*qcloud*")) OR (Processes.process IN ("*wget*","*curl*") AND Processes.process IN ("*update.aegis.aliyun.com*","*uninstall.sh*","*pastebin.com*","*gitee.com*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name host 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*xmrig*","*stratum+tcp*","*--donate-level*","*cryptonight*","*minergate*","*xmr-stak*") OR Processes.process="*chmod +x*" AND Processes.process IN ("*kerberods*","*sustes*","*xmrig*","*Watchbog*")) by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` 
| eval risk_score=85, threat_actor="Rocke (Iron Cybercrime, G0106)"
ucs.kql:
let agent_kill = DeviceProcessEvents 
| where Timestamp > ago(14d) 
| where DeviceInfo has "Linux" or InitiatingProcessFolderPath startswith "/" or FolderPath startswith "/" 
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("aegis_uninstall","quartz_uninstall","qcloud-monitor","YunJing","aliyun-service","bcm-agent") 
   or (ProcessCommandLine has "pkill" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("aliyun","YunJing","aegis","qcloud")) 
   or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("systemctl stop","service stop") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("aegis","aliyun","qcloud")) 
   or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget","curl") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update.aegis.aliyun.com","/uninstall.sh","pastebin.com","gitee.com/c-3-p-o")) 
| project AgentKillTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, AgentKillCmd=ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessCommandLine; 
let miner_drop = DeviceProcessEvents 
| where Timestamp > ago(14d) 
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("xmrig","stratum+tcp","--donate-level","cryptonight","xmr-stak","kerberods","sustes","watchbog","libprocesshider") 
| project MinerTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, MinerCmd=ProcessCommandLine, MinerProc=FileName; 
agent_kill 
| join kind=inner miner_drop on DeviceId 
| where datetime_diff('minute', MinerTime, AgentKillTime) between (-30 .. 240) 
| extend ThreatActor="Rocke / Iron Cybercrime (G0106)", KillChain="Defense Evasion -> Resource Hijacking" 
| project AgentKillTime, MinerTime, DeviceName, AccountName, AgentKillCmd, MinerCmd, ThreatActor
ucs.rationale: The combination 'uninstall Alibaba/Tencent cloud agent THEN run XMRig/cryptonight' is documented by Talos (Aug 2018), Unit 42 (Jan 2019 'Malware Used by Rocke Group Evolves to Evade Detection by Cloud Security Products') and Anomali as Rocke-specific TTP, distinguishing them from generic coinminer worms (Outlaw, TeamTNT) which do not target Aegis/YunJing. Time-bounding the two events to < 4h plus

ucs.title: [LLM] Rocke libprocesshider LD_PRELOAD rootkit hiding XMRig miner
ucs.description: Detects Rocke's hallmark stealth chain: dropping libprocesshider.so and injecting it via /etc/ld.so.preload (T1574.006) so that ps/top/lsof cannot see the miner process, immediately followed by an XMRig/Monero binary launched from a hidden directory (T1564.001) with cron persistence (T1053.003). Unit 42 specifically attributed this libprocesshider variant to Rocke in 2019.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as file_path values(Filesystem.process_name) as writer from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="/etc/ld.so.preload" OR Filesystem.file_name="libprocesshider.so" OR Filesystem.file_path IN ("/usr/local/lib/libprocesshider.so","/lib64/libprocesshider.so")) AND Filesystem.action IN ("created","modified","write") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` 
| join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*xmrig*","*stratum+tcp*","*cryptonight*","*--donate-level*","*kerberods*","*sustes*") OR (Processes.process="*crontab*" AND Processes.process IN ("*pastebin.com*","*gitee.com*","*systemd-network*","*.lib*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.process Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` 
| eval threat_actor="Rocke (G0106)", risk_score=90
ucs.kql:
let preload_drop = DeviceFileEvents 
| where Timestamp > ago(14d) 
| where (FolderPath == "/etc/ld.so.preload" or FileName == "ld.so.preload" or FileName endswith "libprocesshider.so" or FolderPath has_any ("/usr/local/lib/libprocesshider","/lib64/libprocesshider")) 
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified") 
| project DropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, DroppedPath=FolderPath, DroppedFile=FileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName; 
let miner_or_cron = DeviceProcessEvents 
| where Timestamp > ago(14d) 
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("xmrig","stratum+tcp","cryptonight","--donate-level","xmr-stak","kerberods","sustes") 
   or (ProcessCommandLine has "crontab" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("pastebin.com","gitee.com/c-3-p-o","systemd-network","/.lib","/tmp/.")) 
   or (FolderPath has_any ("/tmp/.","/var/tmp/.","/dev/shm/.") and FileName has_any ("xmrig","kerberods","sustes","watchbog")) 
| project ExecTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ExecCmd=ProcessCommandLine, ExecFile=FileName, ExecFolder=FolderPath; 
preload_drop 
| join kind=inner miner_or_cron on DeviceId 
| where datetime_diff('minute', ExecTime, DropTime) between (-60 .. 360) 
| extend ThreatActor="Rocke / Iron Cybercrime (G0106)", Technique="T1574.006 + T1496.001" 
| project DropTime, ExecTime, DeviceName, DroppedPath, ExecCmd, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, ThreatActor
ucs.rationale: Modification of /etc/ld.so.preload is exceedingly rare in production Linux fleets (legitimate use is limited to a handful of agents like Datadog, libsnoopy). When it occurs alongside a cryptonight/XMRig launch or pastebin/gitee-fed cron entry on the same host within hours, the chain is essentially pathognomonic for the Rocke libprocesshider variant published by Unit 42 (2019) and re-used in the Pr
